updates.note: Union Railway Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw informed Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari of the approval for multiple railway projects, including a new Kolkata-Jaipur train, a third line survey between Shalimar and Ayodhya, and doubling of the NJP-Siliguri corridor. These approvals follow recent state-level efforts to expedite long-pending railway infrastructure in West Bengal.
